feedback.text: I hope the Digital Fairness Act could be extended to provide consumer protection for video games, consumers can currently have their access to games they own taken away from them with no protections. This is primarily about games that require the consumer to always be online in order to play the game even if the games is not multiplayer, so consumer protection to make publishers have plans to enable people to freely access their owned games even if/when they decide to no longer provide the online service would be a huge benefit for EU consumer rights.
